# Porosity Determination

**Summary**: The measurement of the volume of pores in a rock.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-gathe|AL-GATHE, 2009]] determined porosity for each core sample.

- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] used porosity-determination to calculate formation factors.

## Scientific Context



- [[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009]] used porosity-determination to calculate formation factors.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Porosity was measured using an overburden permeameter porosimeter (OPP 610). ([[2009-al-gathe|AL-GATHE, 2009, p. 45]])


- Porosity was measured for 44 core samples across three wells. ([[2009-al-gathe-2|AL-GATHE, 2009, p. 58]])
